title: DexCom Investor Relations Overview
note: Corporate overview source for DexCom's glucose biosensing positioning, founding history, and current investor relations materials.

title: Dexcom Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
note: Primary source for Q1 2026 revenue, operating income, net income, guidance, G7 15 Day expansion, and Stelo platform updates.

title: Dexcom G7 15 Day CGM Sensor for Managing Diabetes
note: Product source for Dexcom G7 positioning, coverage, connected partners, safety notes, and 15-day sensor context.

title: Stelo Wearable Glucose Biosensor
note: Product source for Stelo's OTC glucose biosensor positioning, indications for adults not on insulin, personalized insights, and safety statements.

title: DexCom (DXCM) Market Capitalization
note: Point-in-time source for DexCom market capitalization and market-cap history.

title: DexCom (DXCM) P/E Ratio
note: Point-in-time source for DexCom trailing P/E ratio.

title: Welcome to Nightscout
note: Documentation for Nightscout as an open-source CGM data visualization, storage, and sharing system.

title: Nightscout GitHub Organization
note: Public repositories for Nightscout, cgm-remote-monitor, AndroidAPS, and related open-source diabetes tooling.

title: NightscoutFoundation/xDrip
note: Repository source for xDrip+ as an open-source Android CGM data hub supporting multiple data sources, exports, alerts, and Nightscout integration.

title: Welcome to the AAPS documentation
note: Technical and user documentation for the open-source Android artificial pancreas system.

title: OpenAPS.org
note: Primary project source for the open artificial pancreas community and its stated goals.

title: OpenAPS Reference Design
note: Technical reference for how OpenAPS coordinates CGM data, pump history, and automated insulin dosing decisions.

title: Open Food Facts Server Repository
note: Open-source and open-data nutrition context source for metabolic-health and food-response analysis concepts.

title: HealthyPi Move
note: Open-hardware biometric monitor reference used as an adjacent enabler for open external sensing and fabrication pathways, not as a Dexcom-equivalent CGM substitute.
